title: Peppery Silky Peanut Stir-Fry
description: A meal-prep Australian dish featuring a peppery and silky peanut stir-fry made with nutritious ingredients that are suitable for those on specific dietary restrictions.

ingredients.name: Chicken breast
ingredients.notes: ensure to use low-sodium chicken if available

ingredients.name: Bell peppers
ingredients.amount: 1 medium each, bell pepper colors (red, green, yellow, and orange), thinly sliced
ingredients.notes: use a variety for color contrast and added nutrition

instructions: Heat the peanut oil in a large wok or skillet over medium-high heat.
Season the chicken with kosher salt and add to the pan. Stir-fry until golden brown, about 5 minutes.
Add bell peppers and snow peas to the pan. Stir-fry for another 3-4 minutes until vegetables are tender-crisp.
Drizzle a bit more peanut oil if needed, then sprinkle with your favorite chili flakes (such as Sichuan peppercorns or red pepper flakes).
